reviews.review_title: i can’t get over this game
reviews.review_description: basically when i first downloaded this game i thought it was gonna be good and i was gonna have fun but no it’s literally so glitched out there’s absolutely no maps other than forest and no mod menus and also every time i uninstall this game it just downloads itself again without me downloading this game i don’t know if you put a virus in that game that makes you automatically install it again but anyways this game is bad
THIS IS THE BEST GAME EVER WITH OVER 100 MOD MENUS AND ITS AWESOME
W GAME ITS GOT SO MUCH STUFF TO DO OWNER IS CHILL MODS ARE CHILL AND ADMINS ARE CHILL
